description_long: This is a modern bungalow set within a spacious, landscaped lot featuring a main single-story structure with a flat and slightly sloped roof. The building is surrounded by lush greenery, including various trees, shrubs, and flower beds, and is complemented by paved walkways and patios. The front of the bungalow has a paved entrance area with a small garden, while the backyard includes a patio, outdoor seating, and a detached structure that appears to be a garage or garden shed. Large windows are distributed asymmetrically along the facades, allowing for ample natural light. The property is enclosed by low brick and wooden fencing, providing both privacy and aesthetic appeal. Outdoor lighting fixtures and garden furniture further enhance the livability and comfort of the space.
description: A modern single-story bungalow with a flat roof, surrounded by landscaped gardens, patios, and a detached garage or shed. The property features large windows, paved walkways, and is enclosed by low fencing.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, paved walkway, and a small garden with flowering shrubs.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the length of the bungalow, outdoor patio, and the detached garage or shed at the rear.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backyard patio, outdoor seating, and the detached structure, with lush landscaping throughout.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the side elevation, additional garden areas, and the boundary fencing.
